title: MCS 1.21.4+: Cross-platform Custom City pack!
description: By the ModernCraft creative project Server.
body:
MCS 1.21.4: 100% Custom Cross-plat City pack!
By the [ModernCraft creative project Server](https://modrinth.com/server/moderncraft-cross-play).

Bringing a unified look with 100s of blocks and items, including custom animated items, particles, GUI, etc.
This update is a total rework of the former "MCS Flows" into a fully custom pack.

![Banner](https://premiumminecraft.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/PackBanner.png)

# General info & credits

RESOLUTION: 128x (blocks), 64x (items)

VERSION: 1.21.4

V1-4: AgentH14, V5-7: MegaMinerDL

Fire by highwizard

FORMERLY AN EDIT OF UTB Flows & WoK Flows

# Example items (for item frames)
- E.g. music discs -> sports equipemnt & CDs
- E.g. banner patterns -> cards etc
- E.g. food -> modern food (armor trims -> extra foods)
- E.g. arrows -> every color of arrow for item frames
- E.g. pottery sherds -> road signs
- E.g. tools -> modern tools
- E.g. trial keys -> keys
- E.g. mob armor -> office papers
- E.g. candle & bundle & chestboat icons & minecarts -> various household, WC & electronic items
- E.g. buckets -> bottles & bags
- E.g. pots show modern art

BEDROCK SOURCE:
[https://premiumminecraft.com/downloads/MCS_V7.mcpack](https://premiumminecraft.com/downloads/MCS_V7.mcpack)
JAVA SOURCE: [https://premiumminecraft.com/downloads/MCS_V7.zip](https://premiumminecraft.com/downloads/MCS_V7.zip)

# Bedrock version information
The Bedrock version has minor inconsistencies (fewer than ever!)
- Items appear large when held due to the 64x image resolution.
- Certain GUI elements (especially survival) aren't ported over.
- Some inventory icons appear default but fine if placed in-game.
- Furnace Minecart (alt. mouse item) is hard-coded as Java only.
- Bamboo raft and warped/crimson signs don't show transparency.
- Pink petal tiles appear at their vanilla varying Y-heights.

![Cover](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2025/106/18776318-packcover_l.jpg)
